overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of Red Hood character walking through a rainy, dark Gotham City waterfront and urban streets. The character moves from a ferry terminal pier through industrial areas, a tunnel, and into the city center with neo-gothic and modern architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront pier next to ferry terminal

events.description: character stops walking and looks out at the rough ocean waves
character turns away from the water and resumes walking along the pier

agents.ego_description: stands at the pier railing looking at the dark choppy ocean, then turns and walks along the waterfront

entered.detail: large industrial ferry terminal building with weathered metal exterior and upper deck
metal safety railing along the pier edge overlooking the water
dark turbulent water with visible waves crashing against the pier
lit vintage street lamp on the pier illuminating the rain

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rainy waterfront pier next to the Gotham City Ferry terminal, pausing to look at the rough ocean waves before continuing to walk along the railing. A single street lamp provides warm light against the cool blue tones of the rainy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered ferry terminal walkway transitioning to urban street

events.description: moves from open pier to covered walkway beneath the ferry building overhang

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade past the ferry terminal building

entered.detail: multi-story brick buildings with illuminated windows lining the street
vertical digital billboard with pink and white illuminated display

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the covered promenade beside the ferry terminal, transitioning from the open waterfront to an urban street lined with brick buildings. Digital billboards glow in the distance as the rain continues to fall on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront area with muddy terrain

events.description: transitions from paved promenade to muddy industrial ground surface
approaches and enters the stone archway tunnel entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the muddy industrial area toward a dark tunnel entrance

entered.detail: large industrial building with loading docks and metal exterior
metal walkway bridge crossing above the path
stone archway tunnel entrance with interior lights visible

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the paved street into a muddy industrial zone with warehouses and an overhead walkway, approaching a dark stone tunnel that cuts through the infrastructure. The ground becomes uneven and wet with puddles reflecting the sparse lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone tunnel transitioning to open plaza

events.description: exits the dark tunnel into the slightly brighter open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit stone tunnel and emerging into an open urban plaza

entered.detail: rough stone and brick walls of the enclosed tunnel passage
massive steel arch bridge structure spanning across the view
tall historic brick building with fire escapes and lit windows

segments.scene_description: The character traverses the dark stone tunnel with rough walls on both sides, then emerges into an open plaza where a massive steel arch bridge dominates the left side of the view. The lighting shifts from enclosed artificial to open atmospheric as rain becomes visible again.

agents.ego_description: walking down wet city streets lined with historic brick buildings and ornate street lamps

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking along the sidewalk in the rain

entered.detail: row of historic brick apartment buildings with stone stoops and lit windows
ornate black street lamps casting warm light on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: Walking through the city streets with the large arch bridge still visible to the left, the character passes historic brick apartment buildings and ornate street lamps. The wet asphalt reflects the city lights, and a few distant pedestrians are visible through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street approaching modern landmark building

events.description: approaches distinctive modern building with blue geometric window lighting becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: walking toward a modern building with increasing pedestrian activity visible ahead

notable_agents.action: person holding an umbrella walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: contemporary building with distinctive blue-lit geometric glass facade and angular architecture
red and white striped awning of The Stacked Cafe

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a striking modern building with blue geometric lighting visible through its facade, passing The Stacked Cafe on the left. More pedestrians appear in the distance, some carrying umbrellas, as the character continues down the rain-soaked commercial street toward the illuminated landmark.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, rainy waterfront pier into the densely lit commercial heart of Gotham City. It begins beside the ferry terminal under the warm glow of a single street lamp, moving along the railing and through a covered promenade as the open ocean gives way to brick buildings and glowing digital billboards. The scene then shifts from the paved street into a muddy industrial zone with warehouses, leading the camera through a dark, enclosed stone tunnel. As the character emerges from the tunnel, the environment opens into a plaza dominated by a massive steel arch bridge, with the lighting transitioning from oppressive shadows to the atmospheric reflections of wet asphalt and ornate street lamps. Finally, the path leads past historic apartments and a cafe toward a modern landmark featuring striking blue geometric lighting and pedestrians with umbrellas under the persistent rain.
